Operation 'getInterpreter' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. The current description lacks clarity about what the operation returns, making it difficult for AI agents to understand the response structure. Added explicit mention of return type (OverpassJsonResponse/XML) and the types of OSM elements returned. This helps agents determine if this operation matches their data retrieval intent.

data.current_summary: Execute an Overpass query via GET
data.current_description: Executes an Overpass QL or Overpass XML query passed as the 'data' query parameter. Suitable for shorter queries. For larger queries, use the POST method instead.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute Overpass query via GET request
data.description_suggestion: Executes an Overpass QL or Overpass XML query passed as the 'data' query parameter. Suitable for shorter queries due to URL length limitations. Returns an OverpassJsonResponse or XML response containing OSM elements (nodes, ways, relations) matching the query criteria. For larger or complex queries, use the POST method instead.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity about what the operation returns, making it difficult for AI agents to understand the response structure. Added explicit mention of return type (OverpassJsonResponse/XML) and the types of OSM elements returned. This helps agents determine if this operation matches their data retrieval intent.

message: Operation 'postInterpreter' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing output details about response structure and types. Added explicit mention of return type and OSM element types to improve AI agent understanding. Clarified the advantage of POST over GET for handling larger queries and result sets.

data.current_summary: Execute an Overpass query via POST
data.current_description: Executes an Overpass QL or Overpass XML query sent in the POST body. Recommended for longer or complex queries.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute Overpass query via POST request
data.description_suggestion: Executes an Overpass QL or Overpass XML query sent in the POST body. Recommended for longer or complex queries that exceed URL length limitations. Returns an OverpassJsonResponse or XML response containing OSM elements (nodes, ways, relations) matching the query criteria. Supports larger result sets compared to GET method.
data.reasoning: Missing output details about response structure and types. Added explicit mention of return type and OSM element types to improve AI agent understanding. Clarified the advantage of POST over GET for handling larger queries and result sets.

message: Operation 'killMyQueries' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing explicit side effects information and output details. Added clarity about what happens when queries are terminated (incomplete data retrieval risk) and what the operation returns. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of calling this operation and when it's appropriate to use.

data.current_summary: Kill running queries from your IP
data.current_description: Terminates all currently running queries associated with the caller's IP address. Useful for freeing up rate limit slots if a query is taking too long.
data.summary_suggestion: Terminate all running queries for your IP
data.description_suggestion: Terminates all currently running queries associated with the caller's IP address. This operation frees up rate limit slots and server resources. Side effects include immediate cancellation of all in-progress queries from your IP, which may result in incomplete data retrieval. Returns confirmation of termination.
data.reasoning: Missing explicit side effects information and output details. Added clarity about what happens when queries are terminated (incomplete data retrieval risk) and what the operation returns. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of calling this operation and when it's appropriate to use.
